name: Diagnostic Scan
desc: SCAN SUPPORT: scans every foe, exposing weak points (-35% DEF) and feeding the squad targeting data (+20% Crit). Never misses.

name: Sentinel Override
desc: Command protocol: cleanses the squad, grants a heavy shield + DEF, floods 25 Burst to all allies, and lands a baton strike. Every third strike, her Override silently maxes out and the baton comes down as a full command-grade smite.

name: Heart Radiance
desc: Royal love: a team heal that also cleanses all debuffs and empowers every ally's ATK.

name: Relic Song
desc: A legendary melody that buffs the squad's ATK and DEF and surges 30 Burst to everyone.

name: Polka-Dot Dazzle
desc: A dazzling cheer that buffs ATK, shields, and regenerates the whole team.

name: Frost Aegis
desc: Ice-magic protection that cleanses, shields, and heals the entire party over time.

name: Triforce of Wisdom
desc: Sacred wisdom: cleanses allies and wards them, while stripping every enemy of their buffs.

name: Hazbin Redemption
desc: Radiant hope: heals and cleanses the squad, then inspires lasting ATK and Regen.
flavor: Hell is forever, but so is hope!

name: Act of True Love
desc: A selfless act that heals, cleanses, shields, and steadies the whole squad.
flavor: Some people are worth melting for.

name: Pacify Aura
desc: A warm aura that heals, cleanses, shields, and gently builds the team's Burst.
flavor: I hope we can be friends!

name: Tidal Refrain
desc: A refreshing splash that heals, cleanses, and quickens the whole squad (+SPD).

name: Gale Larceny
desc: WIND THIEF: a blink-quick strike that steals a buff from the foe and quickens Mia (+SPD). Cannot be dodged.

name: Jewel Heist
desc: TREASURE HUNTER: a sure critical that snatches a buff off the target and drains 20% of the damage as health.

name: Soft Paws, Sharp Claws
desc: A flawless cat-burglar strike: steals a buff, always crits, and slips past 30% of armor.
flavor: Did you really think you could catch me?

name: Hookshot Ambush
desc: A grappling ambush that steals a buff, then repositions Ada with +SPD and a shield. Always connects.

name: Flare Detonation
desc: Ignites all foes, then instantly DETONATES every burn/poison/static on them for 140% of its remaining damage.

name: Blue Sky Catalyst
desc: A volatile reaction that poisons all foes and detonates their damage-over-time stacks for a chemical blast.
flavor: I am the one who knocks.

name: Radio Demon's Symphony
desc: Static fire engulfs all foes; consumes every DoT on them as a burst, healing Alastor for 30% of all damage.

name: Hyakuretsukyaku
desc: Lightning Legs slow the foe, then strike a guaranteed crit that deals +60% to slowed enemies.

name: Agidyne Bloom
desc: Sets every foe ablaze, then deals +50% damage to anything burning. Self-igniting inferno.

name: Myriad Truths
desc: Zio cascades shock all foes; deals +50% to anything shorted out and shatters shields.

name: Flash Freeze
desc: An icy cyclone that freezes, then shatters: +60% damage to frozen foes, healing Ellen.

name: Absolute Zero
desc: Eternal winter freezes and slows everything, then strikes frozen foes for +50%.
flavor: The cold never bothered me anyway.

name: Mystic Fire Wand
desc: Mystic flame burns all foes and intensifies (+45%) against anything already burning.

name: Redacted Anomaly
desc: Reality un-renders foes (ignore 40% DEF), corrupts them with Static, and deals +50% to the corrupted.

name: Bad Time
desc: Karmic Retribution pierces 60% DEF and applies stacking decay; deals DOUBLE damage to foes below 40% HP.
flavor: you're gonna have a bad time.

name: Star Platinum: ORA Barrage
desc: A time-stopped flurry of guaranteed crits; finishes foes below 45% HP for nearly double, with heavy stagger.

name: Voidhunter's Verdict
desc: A Hollow-hunting strike: always crits, pierces 40% armor, and executes wounded prey below 40% HP.

name: Red Soul Slash
desc: A determined blade, guided by the soul, that lands a sure crit and finishes foes below 35% HP.

name: Precision Headshot
desc: A trained headshot: ignores 50% DEF, always crits, and executes anything below 40% HP outright.

name: Slots: Game Over
desc: A jackpot pull that crits all foes and DELETES anything below 50% HP (x2.5). Slots scale with Luck.

name: Malevolent Shrine
desc: A domain of endless slashes: ignores 50% DEF, applies Dismantle, and cleaves the wounded (below 40% HP).

name: Viltrumite Onslaught
desc: An unstoppable haymaker that ignores half of DEF and grows up to +120% stronger the more wounded Mark is.

name: Rude Buster
desc: A reckless axe shockwave that smashes all shields and hits harder the lower Susie's HP (up to +100%).

name: Mom's Fury
desc: Maternal rage: the more hurt Nicole is, the more it devastates (up to +110%), shattering guards.

name: Loyal Frenzy
desc: A manic, devoted assault: always crits, drains 25%, and rages stronger as Ren's HP drops.

name: Stretchy Bulwark
desc: Jake stretches into a colossal grapple that hits harder the healthier he is, then shields himself.

name: Donut Black Hole
desc: A dense donut that pulls in all foes, hitting harder the fuller (healthier) Homer is. Heals on hit.

name: Primal Stomp
desc: A prehistoric quake that scales with Gertie's current HP and builds heavy stagger on all foes.

name: Shinku Hadoken
desc: A focused ki blast that pierces guard, stuns, and burns brighter (up to +90%) as Ryu's spirit is pushed.

name: Luminaire
desc: The ultimate lightning tech: shocks and shatters guards, dealing +25% per debuff already on each foe.

name: God of Thunder
desc: Mjolnir's storm shatters shields and grows +25% stronger for every affliction already on a foe.

name: Slingshot Mayhem
desc: Chaotic pellets pelt random foes, mark them (-DEF), and hit +25% harder per debuff they carry.

name: Reality Glitch
desc: The animation breaks: glitches and lags all foes, then punishes the afflicted (+25% per debuff).

name: Clarinet of Doom
desc: A note so awful it slows AND weakens every foe, then deals bonus damage to the already-suffering.

name: Hairball Hazard
desc: A repulsive hairball that sickens and slows everyone, scaling with their accumulated misery.

name: Warsuit Annihilation
desc: Kryptonite warsuit beams that strip ALL enemy buffs, then obliterate the target through 50% DEF.
flavor: I am the future of humanity.

name: Just Monika
desc: She edits the enemy roster: deletes every foe's buffs and bypasses 70% of the target's DEF.

name: Cross-Examination
desc: Exposes a contradiction in every foe (-40% DEF for 4t) and rallies the squad's ATK. Cannot miss.

name: Turnabout Objection
desc: OBJECTION! Turns the tables: strips every enemy buff, marks them (-DEF), and rallies 20 Burst to allies.

name: Debate Club Knockout
desc: A sharp argument-turned-punch that breaks guard, stuns, and leaves the foe refuted (-35% DEF).
flavor: I have a few things to say.

name: Hollow Purple
desc: Infinity collides into an imaginary-mass blast: erases 80% of DEF, shatters shields, and cannot be dodged.

name: Aura Sphere Overload
desc: A perfectly-read aura sphere that never misses and always crits, no matter the foe's evasion.

name: Spy Strike Protocol
desc: An elite T.U.F.F. takedown: always crits, pierces 30% armor, and tags the target (-DEF).

name: Star Power Finale
desc: Invincible star energy crashes into every foe with an unavoidable, guaranteed critical hit.

name: Relentless Chase
desc: Corners the foe (slow), then lands a sure crit that deals +50% to anything slowed. Short cooldown.

name: Web-Slinger's Gambit
desc: Webs ensnare and slow all foes, then yank them for +40% damage against anything webbed.

name: Telepathic Foresight
desc: Reads every foe's move: marks them (-DEF), freezes some, and strikes frozen targets for +40%.

name: Spin Dash Barrage
desc: Spin-dashes scattered foes, charging their circuits; deals +60% to any already shorted out.
flavor: Two tails are better than one!

name: Hamon Overdrive
desc: A clackers-blast Hamon surge that shatters guard and deals +60% to DARK-element foes (the undead).

name: Echoes Act 3: Freeze
desc: Echoes stamps crushing weight on the foe (heavy slow), then hits +60% against the slowed.

name: Sky Dragon's Roar
desc: A Sky Dragon's roar that buffets all foes and slows them, while cleansing and healing the caster.

name: Grass Sword Flurry
desc: Algebraic! A grass-blade whirl that poisons all foes and heals Finn for 20% of the damage dealt.

name: Piko Piko Hammer Smash
desc: A loving hammer-blow that shatters shields, staggers, stuns, and enrages Amy (+ATK) for the fight.

name: Zero Point Rift
desc: Tears a rift through the field: ignores 30% DEF, slows, and leaves all foes Displaced (-DEF).

name: Slam Dunk Spike
desc: An athletic spike that stuns and crits for +50% against stunned foes. All net.

name: Anvil Drop Gag
desc: A cartoon anvil flattens the foe - massive stagger, a stun, and +25% per affliction they carry.

name: Counterspell Mastery
desc: CONTROL: silences every foe (no skills for 2 turns), strips all their buffs, and exposes their defenses. The brightest witch of her age.

name: Wingardium Leviosa
desc: A first-year levitates the foe helplessly (stun + -DEF) and shares her notes with the squad (+DEF). Short cooldown.
flavor: Now don't forget the swish and flick!

name: Niffler's Greed
desc: SUPPORT-THIEF: his niffler pilfers a buff from EVERY foe, his creatures heal the squad over time, and he drains a little life on contact.

name: Avada Kedavra
desc: THE KILLING CURSE: bypasses defense, evasion, AND shields, and instantly executes any foe below 50% HP (x3). Sows dread in survivors.
flavor: There is no good and evil, only power.

name: Abstract Splatter
desc: CHAOS PAINT: splatters every foe with a RANDOM curse, then hits +30% harder for each affliction already on the canvas.

name: Inhale & Copy
desc: COPY ABILITY: inhales the foe to COPY their buffs onto himself (they keep theirs), heals 30% of damage, and spits out a random elemental star.

name: Mach Tornado
desc: MULTI-HIT: a blinding sword cyclone strikes 4 times, each hit able to crit independently, and cannot be dodged.

name: Triple-Star Heist
desc: MASTER THIEF: snatches a buff from every foe, voids their remaining boons, plants a shock-trap, and vanishes faster (+SPD).
flavor: The Squeak Squad always gets the treasure.

name: Can't Let You Do That
desc: AMBUSH PREDATOR: a guaranteed critical that hits +70% harder against foes still near full HP. Strikes before they're ready.
flavor: Can't let you do that, Star Fox!

name: Viltrumite Judgment
desc: Pierces 50% of all armor, terrifies every foe (-ATK), and cleaves the wounded (below 40% HP). Overwhelming force.
flavor: Look what they make you give, son.

name: Matter Reconstruction
desc: REALITY CONTROL: cleanses and shields the squad with conjured matter, mends them over time, and UNMAKES every enemy's buffs.
flavor: I can make anything I want.

name: Harmonic Resonance
desc: ELEM +30%: a saxophone solo that harmonizes the squad's elemental damage (+30%), inverts each foe's buffs into debuffs, and rallies the team's Crit.
flavor: If anyone wants me, I'll be in my room.

name: Living Canvas
desc: PAINTER: brings living hazards to life on every foe (a random curse each) while conjuring protective art and healing for the squad.
flavor: Let me paint you a picture.

name: Carnage Scissors
desc: The Azure Grimoire devours the foe's vitality, tearing through armor and feeding on the kill.

name: Rabbit Beat
desc: A blur of Mitsumune-fueled jabs -- too fast to dodge, each landed hit chips deeper into a worn-down guard.
Just wants a snack! ...mostly harmless. Every third swipe, though, something ancient and starving wakes up behind her eyes.
flavor: Nyaha~! ...wait, what's happening to my claws?!

name: Ragnarok
desc: A keyblade flurry that ends in a beam of light -- punishes creatures of darkness and charges the whole party's resolve.

name: Way to the Dawn
desc: Channels the darkness without losing himself to it -- marks the foe's defenses and finishes the weak without mercy.
flavor: The closer you are to the darkness, the brighter you shine.

name: Tangled Web
desc: Her paper cup tail lashes out and snags the foe, lashing it to its own side -- for the next few turns, any damage dealt to its allies also yanks the tether, splashing onto the snared target too. Always finds its mark, always hits twice, and charges the whole squad's Burst.

name: Tyrant's Decree
desc: The Imperator's gohei fan parts the wind -- armor is brushed aside as if it were nothing, and the wound left behind makes everything that follows hurt more.

name: Bolverk's Judgment
desc: A lightning-charged blade strike that never misses its mark and always lands true -- the second swing follows before the foe can even guard.

name: Shooting Star
desc: The buster arm unloads a rapid volley -- extra rounds chamber automatically, and shadows make for easy targeting.
flavor: Time to dig up some treasure!

name: Chaos Delivery
desc: Rocko panics, flails, and somehow it works out -- the foe is afflicted with something unpredictable, and the sheer relief heals him a little.
flavor: Oh, this is bad, this is bad, this is bad--!

name: Heffer's Feast
desc: He eats absolutely everything in sight -- the hungrier he is, the harder this hits, and whatever he bites down on heals him right back up.

name: Inventor's Gambit
desc: A contraption of scavenged parts fires off, dispelling every buff the enemy side is hiding behind, while the whole squad gets fired up on Flik's latest invention and a surge of Burst.
flavor: It's not finished yet, but it'll work! Probably!

name: Tides of War
desc: Water answers her call -- a crashing wave that burns fire-touched foes worse than most, while the whole squad is wrapped in healing currents.
flavor: Water is the source of life, but I can make it the source of your defeat.

name: No Man's Land Protocol
desc: Months of contingency planning collapse onto one target -- defenses are marked and stripped, whatever buff they're hiding gets stolen, the strike cannot be dodged, and anything already on its last legs gets finished outright.
flavor: I've got a plan for you. I always do.

name: Yuletide Miracle
desc: A flurry of wrapped presents bursts open into pure holiday cheer -- the squad is cleansed of every debuff, wrapped in a gift-shaped shield, fired up with festive strength, and the whole team's Burst meter overflows.
flavor: Naughty or nice, everyone gets a gift from me!

name: Babysitter's Wrath
desc: Whatever's standing between her and a paycheck gets cracked open -- the stronger the barrier, the worse the payback -- and the follow-up swing can't be dodged.

name: Primal Smash
desc: Raw prehistoric strength -- barriers don't slow this down, the hit always lands true, and anything left reeling gets finished outright.

name: XJ-9 Override
desc: Combat protocols kick in -- the squad is patched up, wrapped in nanotech armor plating, and surges with Burst.

name: Silent Alliance
desc: She slips through the underbrush and signals her allies -- the whole squad finds cover behind a shield and starts mending wounds, no questions asked.
flavor: We can help each other. That's how we survive.

name: Tag and Roll
desc: A fresh coat of spray paint scrambles the enemy's buffs while the squad skates off with a shield and a burst of speed.

name: Dragoon's Descent
desc: Leaps skyward and crashes back down with a piercing lance strike, briefly emboldened by the fall.

name: Blade Heart: Finale
desc: Tao dumps her stacked Blade Heart into one shot, hitting harder against debuffed targets -- and if it kills, she's already gone before the body drops, untouchable for a moment.
flavor: Every bullet, every blade -- make it count.

name: Crimson Nova: Spirit's Eruption
desc: Detonates a roaring pillar of flame on the target, searing them badly. Deals massive bonus damage to anything already burning.

name: No Fate
desc: Sarah barks a tactical order and lays down cover fire. Decent intel, mediocre payload -- she was never the muscle of this operation.
flavor: The future's not set. There's no fate but what we make for ourselves.

name: Game Over Screen
desc: Gaz paints a target lock on the enemy -- for the next few turns, the whole squad's attacks home in on them first.

name: Glyphic Mandate
desc: King invokes a forgotten titan's decree, sharpening the squad's instincts -- attacks against an elementally weak foe hit much harder for a few turns.
flavor: I am the king of all monsters... mostly.

name: Glacial Barrier
desc: Encases the whole squad in protective ice for a moment -- nothing can touch them while it holds.

name: YOU'RE FIRED!!!
desc: Benson finally loses it. Deals devastating bonus damage to any target the squad has already painted with a lock-on.

name: Solar Branding
desc: Blaze sears a brand into the enemy's hide -- for a few turns, the whole squad's attacks are drawn to the burning mark.

name: Leap of Faith
desc: Frog vaults clean out of harm's way and comes down blade-first. While airborne, nothing can touch him.

name: Shikigami Tactics
desc: Megumi deploys his shikigami to scout the enemy's elemental weakness, sharpening the squad's strikes against it.

name: Rainbow Power Playtime!
desc: An explosion of sparkly chaos -- somehow it hits way harder when the squad already has a target painted.

name: Tiger Seven Forms: Finale
desc: The seventh and final form lands with crushing force -- devastating against a foe the squad has already marked.

name: Airstrike Beacon
desc: Calls in a precision airstrike that lands far harder on a target the squad has already lit up.

name: Omnipresence: Whispers from the Void
desc: Reality bends as HIM closes in from every angle at once -- a target already marked has nowhere left to hide.
flavor: Ooooh, this is going to be FUN.

name: It's TV Time!
desc: Tenna puts the enemy live ON AIR -- the whole squad's attacks lock onto whoever's in the spotlight.

name: Shadow Clone Rasengan Barrage
desc: Naruto summons a wave of shadow clones to flank the target, then drives a spinning Rasengan home -- the clones poof away afterward, but not before drawing the heat off him.

name: Imagination Rainbow!
desc: SpongeBob unleashes pure, unfiltered imagination -- the whole squad is cleansed, shielded, and feeling like a million bucks (well, Krabby Patties).

name: Ballistic Chain Frenzy
desc: ELEM +50% (highest): Kazeto whirls her ball-and-chain into a foe, CRUSHING them — each hit adds a stack that shreds their DEF and makes her next blow hit even harder. Floods the squad with a massive +50% elemental damage and hypes herself into a frenzy (+ATK, +SPD).

name: Kanzeon: Full Analysis
desc: ELEM +40%: Himiko scans the whole battlefield, exposing every foe's weakness (-DEF) and feeding the squad targeting data — +40% elemental damage and +20% Crit. Cannot miss.

name: Turtle-School Kamehameha
desc: ELEM +30%: a channeled Kamehameha that blows through the target's shield and rocks them, while charging the squad's elemental damage (+30%) and Goku's own power (+ATK).

name: Uroboros Infestation
desc: ELEM +30% (complex): Wesker injects the Uroboros virus into all foes — stripping their buffs, ignoring 45% DEF, and draining 30% of the carnage as life. The mutation empowers the squad's elemental damage (+30%) and his own strength.

name: Capsule Corp Arsenal
desc: ELEM +35% (complex): Bulma deploys a barrage of gadgets — a Dragon Radar scan that marks every foe (-DEF) and dispels their buffs, while capsule tech shields the squad, floods 20 Burst, and overclocks their elemental damage (+35%). Never misses.

name: Onigiri Comfort Zone
desc: ELEM +30%: a lazy but loving cat-swipe that saps 25% of the damage as health, cleanses the squad, and wraps them in a cozy +30% elemental buff with lasting Regen. Slows the foes down to her pace.

name: Explosive Birdarang Volley
desc: ELEM +30%: a barrage of trick birdarangs that shatters the target's guard and stuns them, while the Boy Wonder's leadership sharpens the squad's elemental damage (+30%) and Crit.

name: Make a Contract
desc: ELEM +30% (eerie): Kyubey offers a wish that warps fate — a random curse strikes every foe, their protections are stripped away, and the squad is flooded with 30 Burst and a +30% elemental pact. There is always a price.
flavor: Make a contract with me, and become a magical girl!

name: Super Saiyan Overdrive
desc: ELEM +15% (lowest): a golden-aura haymaker built for one thing — annihilating a single target. Always crits, tears through shields, and executes foes below 40% HP for double. So focused on his own power that the squad only catches a small +15% elemental spark.
flavor: This is the power of a Super Saiyan!

name: I Wish For... EVERYTHING!
desc: REALITY-BENDING (cycles): Cosmo and Wanda grant a DIFFERENT wish every single cast, rotating through three modes. WISH 1 — Cosmo's Chaos: a random curse strikes every foe and the blast hits +70%. WISH 2 — Wanda's Wisdom: strips all enemy buffs, exposes them (-40% DEF) and sharpens the squad's Crit. WISH 3 — Fairy Teamwork: empowers the whole squad's elemental damage (+40%), shields, heals and floods 20 Burst. It's never the same wish twice.
flavor: I wish my fairies could grant ANY wish!

name: Final Heaven
desc: COMBO FINISHER: a flurry of martial strikes ending in a point-blank uppercut — always crits, lands two extra hits, and drains life with every blow.

name: Omnislash
desc: LIMIT BREAK: a blur of sword strikes that pierces 45% DEF, lands three extra hits, and finishes the wounded (below 35% HP) for double damage.

name: Gear Fourth: King Kong Gun
desc: BOUNCEMAN: pumps Haki into a titanic punch — hits harder the healthier Luffy is, shatters any guard, and builds heavy stagger.
flavor: I'm gonna be King of the Pirates!

name: Fire Dragon's Roar
desc: DRAGON SLAYER: a scorching breath that engulfs every foe in flame, deals +50% to anything already burning, and lets Natsu "eat" the heat back as HP.

name: Redemption's Blue Flame
desc: INNER FIRE: a blazing strike that burns brightest against darkness (+60% vs DARK-type foes) while cleansing the squad's doubts (removes all debuffs).
flavor: It is time for me to look inward and begin asking the big questions: Who am I, and what do I want?

name: Tsukuyomi: Amaterasu
desc: GENJUTSU AMBUSH: traps the target in an inescapable illusion (cannot miss, always crits) then sears them with unquenchable black flame.
